Legal

Privacy Policy

We collect only the information needed to process orders, provide support, and improve your shopping experience.

Personal data such as name, email, phone number, and shipping address is used for order fulfillment, updates, and customer communication.

Payment details are processed through secure third-party gateways. Antariya does not store full card information on its servers.

We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Data is shared only with logistics, payment, and support partners required to run the service.

You may request data correction or deletion by writing to hello@antariyaofficial.com.
